roa.docketEntryComment: FELONY PRELIMINARY
FELONY PRELIMINARY
/PROBATION IN SC#163736 IS HEREBY TERMINATED AS UNSUCCESSFUL,/
CONT TO 7/1/97 FOR TO SET OR DISPO AT 845AM IN D24
CONT TO 6/12/97 FOR TS/DISPO AT 845AM IN D24
CONT TO 5/12/97 FOR SENT/RPT AT 845AM IN D24
DEEMED PRETRIED
/SEE MINUTES OF 03-13-97, DEPARTMENT 24,///THE MATTER IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR,/
MO W/D PLEA NG GRTD;W/CONSTL RTS;PLD G CT1-11352(A)HS;CT MKS FND/ACCPLEAREF APD/PSR&CONT 4/14/97 845AM D24 SENT;TRIAL DATE VAC'D
/TEXT TRANS FROM DEPT 22 TO DEPT 24//TRANS 24 FW  PRETRIAL CONFERENCE//TR:970317/0930/S22
/MO TO CONT:BY DEFENSE//CONTS GTW//MO GRTD//PC:970313/1400/S22/TR:970317/0930/S22
/CTORD CAUSE DEEMED PRETRIED//TR 970121/0930/S22
/TEXT TRANS FROM DEPT 22 TO DEPT 25//TRANS 25 FW  PRETRIAL CONFERENCE//
/MO TO CONT:BY DEFENSE//CONTS GTW//MO GRTD//PC:961003/1400/S22/TR:961015/0930/S22
DEEMED PRETRIED
CONT 8/14/96 9AM D26 FOR PTC
/TEXT TRANS FROM DEPT 22 TO DEPT 26//TRANS 26 FW  PRETRIAL CONFERENCE//TR:960826/0930/S22
/TEXT DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG//FAW/DEFT ARR/TN1/GTW//PC:960724/1030/S22/TR:960826/0930/S22
HTA, BAIL SET AT ORPJ
